module.description: Structured house rules for the guest booklet
surface.host.main.title: House rules
surface.host.main.subtitle: Define the rules shown to guests
host.rule.title: Title
host.rule.subtitle: Subtitle
host.main.help: Leave a rule empty to hide it.
home.card.title: House rules
home.card.empty.title: No house rules yet

home.card.empty.hint: Open the House rules tab in the host dashboard to add items.
home.card.error.title: Rules temporarily unavailable
home.card.error.description: Could not load house rules. Try again in a moment.
home.card.error.hint: If this persists, contact your host.

module.status.incomplete.description: Finish house rules configuration in the host dashboard
module.status.inactive.title: House rules disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
